4. **PlaceOrder_NullEmail_ThrowsArgumentException** - Input validation → "OrderPlacement", "Validation"


5. **CalculateDiscount_HighPoints_Returns15Percent** - Discount logic → "Discount"

11. **CancelOrder_ShippedOrder_ThrowsInvalidOperationException** - Business rule enforcement → "OrderCancellation", "Validation"
12. **CalculateDiscount_Exactly500Points_Returns10Percent** - Boundary condition testing → "Discount"
13. **PlaceOrder_SendsConfirmationEmail** - Email integration verification → "OrderPlacement", "Email"
14. **CalculateDiscount_NegativePoints_ThrowsArgumentOutOfRangeException** - Input validation → "Discount", "Validation"
15. **PlaceOrder_InvalidEmailFormat_ThrowsArgumentException** - Format validation → "OrderPlacement"
16. **CalculateDiscount_MediumPoints_Returns10Percent** - Discount tier logic → "Discount"
17. **PlaceOrder_EmptyItemList_ThrowsArgumentException** - Collection validation → "OrderPlacement", "Validation"
18. **Constructor_NullEmailService_ThrowsArgumentNullException** - Dependency guard clause → "Construction", "Validation"
19. **CalculateDiscount_LowPoints_Returns5Percent** - Lower tier discount → "Discount"
20. **CancelOrder_NonExistentOrder_ThrowsInvalidOperationException** - State validation → "OrderCancellation", "Validation"
21. **PlaceOrder_NegativePrice_ThrowsArgumentException** - Price validation → "OrderPlacement", "Validation"
22. **CalculateDiscount_ZeroPoints_ReturnsZero** - Zero case handling → "Discount"
23. **PlaceOrder_NullItemList_ThrowsArgumentException** - Null reference validation → "OrderPlacement", "Validation"
